game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
{
  "concept": "Arcade strategy where you aim a cannon, spawn units, and route them through blue multiplier gates to amplify your mob before it collides with enemy defenders and destroys their base. Core verbs: adjust aim, time volleys, thread mobs through moving gates/speed pads, and trigger a selected Champion ability to break stalemates. Progression revolves around unlocking/upgrading Cannons, Mobs, and Champions between runs. For this spec, the flow is re-framed into discrete levels with score-chasing: each stage is a short lane puzzle with dynamic gates and traps that rewards efficient pathing, smart Champion timing, and minimal losses.",
  "name": "Mob Control",
  "developer": "Voodoo",
  "genre": "Casual / Physics-Strategy",
  "price": "Free (Offers In-App Purchases)",
  "rating": "4.6/5 (371.3K ratings)",
  "rank": "#98 in Casual",
  "source_url": "https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mob-control/id1562817072",
  "level_structure": "Worlds 1–8. Each World has 12 stages: 9 standard (static/moving gates, speed pads), 2 special (Base Invasion or Counter-Attack variants), 1 Boss Level with fortified base and elite defenders. Clear any 8 stages in a World with rank ≥A to unlock its Boss; beating the Boss unlocks the next World. Champions League-style score thresholds unlock optional ‘Immortal’ challenge stages after World 4.",
  "scoring_model": {
    "base_clear": 1000,
    "time_bonus": "Up to +400 vs par (linear decay).",
    "pathing_bonus": "+10 per blue multiplier gate passed (value × 10); +50 for perfect blue-chain (no red/negative gates).",
    "survivor_bonus": "+1 per unit that reaches the enemy base (capped at +500).",
    "champion_play": "+100 for first successful Champion break (destroying a fortified node) and +50 for each additional unique Champion used.",
    "destruction_bonus": "+1 per obstacle destroyed; +25 per elite defender eliminated (cap +300).",
    "penalties": {
      "red_gate_penalty": "-25 per red/negative gate entered",
      "unit_loss": "-1 per unit lost to pits/traps (cap -300)",
      "retry": "-100 per restart"
    },
    "multipliers": {
      "clean_route": "×1.10 if no red gates hit",
      "boss_breach": "×1.15 if Boss base falls within 20% of par time"
    },
    "ranks": { "S": "≥2400", "A": "≥1900", "B": "≥1400", "C": "<1400" }
  },
  "keyboard_inputs": {
    "Aim Left/Right": "Left/Right",
    "Fine Aim": "A/D",
    "Fire / Hold to Stream": "Space",
    "Champion Ability": "Q",
    "Swap Champion": "E",
    "Switch Ammo/Cannon (if equipped)": "R",
    "Toggle Slow-Mo (aim assist)": "Shift",
    "Quick Volley (burst)": "F",
    "Restart Stage": "Z",
    "Next / Continue": "Enter",
    "Pause / Menu": "Esc"
  },
  "assumptions": [
    "Exact level count, world count, and rank thresholds are added for this spec; the store page mentions Boss Levels and competitive leagues but not a fixed stage schema.",
    "Keyboard bindings are chosen to satisfy the keyboard-only constraint; original game is touch-based.",
    "Scoring rubric (bonuses/penalties/multipliers) is designed to reflect the gate-multiplier and base-destruction mechanics while enabling clear S/A/B/C ranks.",
    "‘Special’ stages adapt the page’s Base Invasion/Counter-Attack modes into single-level objectives suitable for score play."
  ]
}
game_info.description: Command your cannon to spawn and amplify your mob army! Aim carefully and fire units through blue multiplier gates to grow your forces exponentially. Navigate through a dynamic battlefield filled with moving gates, speed pads, and obstacles. Use your Champion's special ability strategically to break through enemy defenses. Your goal: overwhelm the enemy base with your amplified mob while minimizing losses. Chain blue gates for massive bonuses, avoid red gates that reduce your forces, and achieve S-rank by maximizing survivors and speed!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Rotate cannon aim
Space: Fire units (hold for continuous stream)
Shift: Activate slow-motion aim assist
Z: Use Champion ability to clear obstacles
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart current level
Enter: Start game / Continue to next level

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic cannon firing and unit spawning mechanics. Validates that units are created when Space is pressed, units move forward, and the game tracks them properly. Ensures the cannon can aim and fire successfully.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Fire units continuously while slowly sweeping the cannon left and right to test aiming. No strategic gate routing, just validates core spawn mechanics and movement. Fires enough units to trigger some gate interactions naturally.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Units spawn successfully, move forward across the battlefield, and eventually reach the enemy base or get destroyed. The game tracks unit count and score properly. Test is successful if units spawn and move without errors for at least 300 frames.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal gameplay to achieve victory with high score. Implements strategic aiming to route units through blue multiplier gates while avoiding red gates. Uses Champion ability at critical moments to destroy obstacles. Aims for S-rank by maximizing multipliers and survivors.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyzes gate positions and aims cannon to thread units through blue gates in sequence. Adjusts aim dynamically as gates move. Uses slow-motion when precision is needed. Activates Champion ability to destroy fortified obstacles blocking optimal paths. Times volleys to hit multiple blue gates in succession.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by destroying the enemy base. Scores at least A-rank (1900+) through efficient pathing, blue gate chaining, and high survivor count. Test is successful when the base is destroyed and final rank is A or S.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests Champion ability mechanics and cooldown system. Validates that the ability activates correctly, destroys obstacles as intended, and has proper cooldown restrictions. Ensures ability usage contributes to score bonuses.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Waits for obstacles to spawn, then uses Champion ability (Z key) to destroy them. Attempts to use ability again immediately to test cooldown prevention. Fires units to build up score, then uses ability strategically on fortified nodes.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Champion ability activates successfully, destroys nearby obstacles, enters cooldown preventing immediate reuse, and grants +100 champion bonus on first use. Test succeeds if ability works correctly and score reflects proper bonuses.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests collision detection between units and gates. Validates that blue gates multiply unit count correctly, red gates reduce units, and the scoring system properly tracks gate interactions with appropriate bonuses and penalties.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Aims specifically at blue gates to test multiplication mechanics. Then deliberately aims at red gates to verify penalty system. Alternates between gate types to test scoring calculations. Monitors unit count changes through each gate passage.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Blue gates increase unit count by their multiplier value and award +10 per gate. Red gates reduce units and apply -25 penalty. Perfect blue chain (no red gates) awards bonus. Test succeeds if all gate interactions produce correct unit counts and scores.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests win condition achievement by destroying the enemy base. Validates that sufficient units reaching the base triggers victory, displays proper game over screen with rank calculation, and allows restart to start screen.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Fires continuous stream of units through optimal blue gate path to maximize army size. Ensures enough units survive to destroy the base. Completes level as quickly as possible to maximize time bonus. Verifies final score calculation and rank assignment.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Enemy base health depletes to zero, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. Game over screen displays with calculated rank (S/A/B/C), final score breakdown, and restart prompt. Test succeeds when victory is achieved and proper game over state is displayed.
